summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that WM is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $220.98. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 40.0%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $247.15. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
